status_note: Memory-optimized variant: cyankiwi-seq8-mtp4 plus an FP8 (E4M3) KV cache (kv-cache-dtype=fp8). Roughly halves KV-cache memory, freeing headroom for longer contexts and larger batches on a 24 GB A10G. Provided as a ready-to-serve config; not separately benchmarked.
notes: Config delta vs cyankiwi-seq8-mtp4: adds VLLM_KV_CACHE_DTYPE=fp8. KV quantization affects only attention-cache reads, so quality impact is expected to be negligible.
